claims.claim: Metrics: accuracy, ROC-AUC, Brier score, and Expected Calibration Error at 10 bins (ECE@10).

evidence_refs.quote: We investigate whether training a verifier on multiple backend renderings of the same semantic verification case—where backend identity is rendered non-predictive of the correctness label—reduces backend-specific shortcut learning relative to single-backend training or naively pooled multi-backend training with label/backend confounds.
